chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D – 486 of 2021. (Bilawal Hussain Vs. P.O Sindh & others) [ Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objection (at flag-A). 2. For Hearing of CMA 2214/21. 3. For Hearing of main case. - 21-02-2024. M/s. Abdul Raheem Mahar & Abdul Sallam Shaikh Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Abro Assistant A.G. - At the very out-set, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits provided the petitioner is permitted to seek his appointment with the respondents on merits in accordance with law by making such application, whenever the posts are advertised by them formally, which is not opposed by the learned Assistant A.G for the State. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
